name: Pumpkin Puree
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 425°F.
2 Remove the seeds and strings from the pumpkin and cut the pumpkin into wedges.
3 Place the wedges on an oiled baking sheet and cover with foil.
4 Bake until thoroughly soft, about 45 minutes.
5 Peel away the skin.
6 Puree the pumpkin in the food processor using the steel blade.
7 Measure what you need and freeze the rest.
